title: cactus regius
intro: Cactus regius, also known as the lion's tail or prickly pear, is a species of cactus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of wounds, burns, and skin conditions due to its high concentration of vitamin E, flavonoids, and mucilages. The health benefits of cactus regius include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and improve skin health. Cactus regius is often used in herbal preparations such as salves, ointments, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
